item.name: Ark Identification Key
item.description: A thin, rectangular piece of what appears to be cermet. Placing it near the Ark will magically bring the advanced transforming machine to life.

mount.name: Ark
mount.action: Summon forth your Ark, a bipedal warmachina disguised as an airship─or an airship disguised as a bipedal warmachina, if you prefer.
mount.description: Seeking to develop an advanced transforming airship, the engineers of Garlond Ironworks turned to the expertise of a former Illuminati scientist. The result is a machina that can convert between bipedal and assault craft forms in the blink of an eye.
mount.tooltip:
It would seem there is more
to you than meets the eye.
- Yugiri
